mapper.select: select m.model_id as modelId, m.model_key as modelKey, m.model_name as modelName, m.category_id as categoryId, c.category_name as categoryName, m.form_type as formType, m.form_id as formId, f.form_name as formName, m.visible_flag as visibleFlag, m.sort, m.description, m.published_definition_id as publishedDefinitionId, m.has_unpublished_changes as hasUnpublishedChanges, m.create_time as createTime, m.update_time as updateTime from t_bpm_model m left join t_bpm_category c on c.category_id = m.category_id and c.deleted_flag = 0 left join t_bpm_form f on f.form_id = m.form_id and f.deleted_flag = 0 where m.deleted_flag = 0 and m.model_id = #{modelId}

select m.model_id as modelId, m.model_key as modelKey, m.model_name as modelName, m.category_id as categoryId, c.category_name as categoryName, m.form_type as formType, m.form_id as formId, f.form_name as formName, f.schema_json as formSchemaJson, f.layout_json as formLayoutJson, m.simple_model_json as simpleModelJson, m.start_rule_json as startRuleJson, m.manager_scope_json as managerScopeJson, m.title_rule_json as titleRuleJson, m.summary_rule_json as summaryRuleJson, m.variable_mapping_json as variableMappingJson, m.instance_no_rule_id as instanceNoRuleId, m.published_definition_id as publishedDefinitionId, m.has_unpublished_changes as hasUnpublishedChanges from t_bpm_model m left join t_bpm_category c on c.category_id = m.category_id and c.deleted_flag = 0 left join t_bpm_form f on f.form_id = m.form_id and f.deleted_flag = 0 where m.deleted_flag = 0 and m.model_id = #{modelId}
